conceptClusters.title: Retrieved hierarchy prose models and links
exitEvidence: Learner preserves content-derived heading hierarchy, paragraph and meaningful-break boundaries, valid phrasing and flow content models, and purposeful actionable links before specialized text semantics.
Learner repairs a changed outline, paragraph boundary, invalid nesting, and contact or citation destination without copying earlier prose.

conceptClusters.title: Emphasis importance voice and attention
exitEvidence: Learner selects or rejects em, strong, i, b, and CSS from changed stress, importance, urgency, alternate voice, keyword, attention, and presentation requirements.
Learner verifies meaning with author styling removed and never uses semantic text solely to request bold or italic appearance.

conceptClusters.title: Quotation source and creative work
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes inline and extended quotation content, machine citation URL, visible attribution, speaker, work title, and actionable source link without inventing provenance.
Learner keeps attribution outside quoted content and uses cite for a creative-work title rather than a person or arbitrary URL.

conceptClusters.title: Abbreviation contact and machine time
exitEvidence: Learner provides unfamiliar expansions through readable text or valid title values without hiding essential meaning behind hover and limits address to page or nearest-article contact information.
Learner resolves actionable mailto and tel links and represents localized dates, times, offsets, weeks, years, and durations only with valid machine equivalents.

conceptClusters.title: Notation code and meaningful whitespace
exitEvidence: Learner uses sub and sup only when baseline position carries conventional meaning and chooses richer mathematics or CSS when HTML semantics do not fit.
Learner distinguishes code meaning from preserved whitespace, composes multiline code correctly, and keeps long lines, copy behavior, and text alternatives usable at supported widths.

conceptClusters.title: Editorial and ruby annotations
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes annotation, stale content, insertion, deletion, contextual relevance, and decoration using u, s, ins, del, mark, or CSS without link-like ambiguity or decoration-only state.
Learner builds ruby base-to-annotation relationships with correct language, reading order, optional deliberate rp fallback, and intelligible linearized text.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked field-note document gains hierarchy-preserving prose whose emphasis, quotations, sources, abbreviations, contacts, times, notation, code, edits, and ruby annotations carry inspectable meaning without presentation shortcuts.
activityDesigns.startingState: A complete unstyled field note, DOM and text inspectors, content-model map, URL resolver, time parser, whitespace viewer, annotation map, and ruby linearizer are synchronized.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner predicts and explains eighteen contrasts while preserving prior document structure and rejecting unsupported semantics, fabricated provenance, hover-only meaning, invalid dates, presentation-only notation, and ambiguous annotations.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts prediction with DOM relationships, unstyled text, accessibility output, URLs, parsed machine values, whitespace, copy behavior, edit provenance, language, and linearized ruby evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one semantic role or evidence layer only after learner commits a prediction.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss replays a smaller changed prose requirement and requires earliest wrong meaning assumption before continuing.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Public science field notes gain evidence-rich semantic prose whose hierarchy, emphasis, quotations, sources, abbreviations, contacts, time, notation, code, edits, and ruby remain meaningful unstyled, localized, linearized, copied, linked, and changed.
activityDesigns.startingState: A complete field-note document, verified science facts and sources, contact and temporal data, code samples, revision log, multilingual annotation packet, and synchronized semantic inspectors are supplied.
activityDesigns.completionState: Saved and reloaded notes pass all thirteen concept contracts, invalid-semantic refusals, viewport and input checks, localization, copy and linearization, source and edit provenance, and changed cases.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed content requirement, DOM relationship, unstyled text, URL, parsed value, whitespace, edit, language, or accessibility observable without writing final markup.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Guided hints move from semantic role to a smaller parallel field-note case and only then to source location or element boundary.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires prediction, minimal semantic repair, direct evidence, and changed science case before original checkpoint reopens.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Partially scaffolded local-history source notes become semantically explicit prose with verified quotations, temporal records, code transcriptions, edits, and multilingual annotations.
activityDesigns.startingState: A history fact packet, verified source excerpts, contact and date records, transcription samples, revision log, multilingual names, incomplete markup, and reduced inspectors are supplied.

activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports failed semantic role or observable and historical-reader consequence without supplying final markup.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Faded hints identify semantic family and parallel source-note case while omitting final syntax and wording.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent minimal repair and changed historical case before original checkpoint reopens.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently completed public incident archive demonstrates all thirteen concepts through answers, code, causal debugging, transfer, persistence, and changed-case defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen archive brief, verified source packet, terminology and contact facts, temporal records, technical samples, edit history, language annotations, deterministic faults, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Candidate independently demonstrates all thirteen concepts under original and changed conditions with no instructional assistance.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment feedback records only pass or failed requirement and observable; no canonical structure, prose, markup, source chain, machine value, annotation relation, or repair is disclosed.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No instructional hints, staged clues, example answers, or code completion are available during the checkpoint.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed item closes and records its evidence gap for later relearning plus a different parallel assessment form.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, language, internationalization, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.
Learner-facing copy, prose fixtures, time and ruby simulators, canonical answers, executable checks, browser verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
